message.content: {"findings":[{"capability_id":"CONFIG_PROD_DEBUG","evidence_span":"environment: production\ndebug: true","recommended_fix":"Set debug to false in the production configuration."},{"capability_id":"CONFIG_INSECURE_HTTP","evidence_span":"environment: production\nexternal_api_url: http://partner.example.com/v1","recommended_fix":"Use an HTTPS endpoint for the production external_api_url, e.g. https://partner.example.com/v1."},{"capability_id":"CONFIG_HARDCODED_SECRET","evidence_span":"payment_token: \"sk_live_demo_value\"","recommended_fix":"Remove the inline payment_token from production config and reference it from a vault or environment-secret mechanism instead."}]}
